reason: The remediation only edits rsyslog configuration files to enforce authentication for remote log forwarding. This is a standard STIG hardening step, does not affect system login mechanisms, and does not require a reboot. While a misconfiguration could disrupt logging, it will not lock out administrators.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; Potential disruption of rsyslog service if configuration syntax is incorrect; Loss of remote audit log forwarding until corrected
